data.name: Milfy City - Final Edition
data.detailed_description:
The story is about a college student who moves to a new city to study. He rents a house with a couple of other students and local business owners. Following on from this he asks his college Professor out on a date, but is rejected. The game begins here as a dating simulator, with options to pursue romantic relationships with other students, a couple of local business owners, and a couple of College staff.



- Build your relations with women in the game!
- Animated romantic scenes!
- High-Quality Renders!
- Enjoy puzzles and minigames!
- Interactive map
- Movement system
- Inventory
- Receive text messages from the women you date!
+ More



- Over 10, 000 + static images
- More than 800+ animated scenes
- A large variety of animated scenes for the different poses and positions!
- Many hours of gameplay time!



- Masturbation
- Handjob
- Blowjob
- Boobjob
- Vaginal Sex
- Anal Sex
- Cosplay
- Sex toys
- Footjob
…even more to explore!

data.short_description: Milfy City is an erotic adult game. Play as a college student trying to navigate his way through a city filled with hot women! Meet a cast of seductive ladies, enjoy erotic animations, and discover sexy secrets and hidden collectibles!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later
  • 處理器: Intel based or M1 under Rosetta
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
